items.headline: Freshworks (NASDAQ: FRSH) announces $400 million share repurchase program after achieving GAAP profitability in 2025
Freshworks (NASDAQ: FRSH) Q1 2026 results: revenue $228.6M (+16% YoY), non-GAAP operating income $41.0M (17.9% margin)
Freshworks stock trades around $8.9 after falling about 26–27% year-to-date in 2026; consensus target implies ~36% upside
